headline: Evaluating W. R. Berkley (WRB) After Strong First Quarter Earnings Growth
summary: What the latest quarter tells you about W. R. Berkley W. R. Berkley (WRB) just posted first quarter results that put fresh numbers around its recent share performance and valuation. For investors, the new revenue, earnings and buyback figures give clearer context for the stock. See our latest analysis for W. R. Berkley. The latest earnings update, recent share repurchases and leadership changes sit against a mixed price backdrop, with a 2.76% 1 month share price return but a 4.08% year to...
